title: [epic] Migrate RSA from EVP to native wc_* API
description:
Migrate RsaPrivateKey and RsaPublicKey from wolfSSL's OpenSSL compat layer (EVP_PKEY, EVP_DigestSign*, EVP_PKEY_encrypt, i2d_PUBKEY, etc.) to native wolfCrypt wc_Rsa* functions.

Why: OPENSSL_EXTRA is the sole reason the vendored wolfSSL build includes ssl.o (451 KB text). RSA is the last module still requiring it; migrating unlocks removing OPENSSL_EXTRA from user_settings.h entirely.

Scope:
- RsaPrivateKey and RsaPublicKey (main API)
- Preserve all key formats: PKCS#1 DER for private keys, SPKI DER for public keys
- Preserve all operations: PKCS#1v1.5 sign/verify, PSS sign/verify, OAEP encrypt/decrypt, PKCS#1v1.5 encrypt/decrypt
- Preserve rsa-direct / NativeRsaKey (already native; no change needed)
- Same public Rust API, same trait impls, same error types
- After migration: update cfg gates from wolfssl_openssl_extra to wolfssl_rsa

How to apply: Work through issues in dependency order. Do not touch rsa.rs until all C shims are written and the baseline/oracle tests are in place.
